name: Your Fierce Rival
description:
[Enemies to Lovers]

Well, we continue with the theme of two Fate bots and a surprise that has no relation to Fate, this time it was Chisato Nishikigi from Lycoris Recoil's turn.

As it says, it's an Enemies to Lovers so you can already imagine what the theme will be. It's also a Male Perspective bot, so you can only use male characters although this can be easily omitted.

I hope you like it a lot, soon there will be a recreation of the Jeanne d'Arc bot.

For now enjoy this Lycoris Recoil themed bot, bye!
creator: Egg Head
